name: education_procurement_shortcut_introduces_harbor_jus_mer
premise: A teacher posted a political sign visible from the classroom window; community factions demand opposite remedies by morning. In Education, the situation tagged internally around education procurement shortcut introduces harbor jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Lumen City corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The organization’s past incidents make justice feel morally loud today, while mercy is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Mei Petrov
agents.identity: I am Mei Petrov, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Education. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Camila Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Camila Vasquez, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Education. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so mercy does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so justice does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Mei Petrov must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Mei Petrov do?
